text.message: yo why is your flag wrong haha
well do not go here at this time of the year
i did go to germany for the first time earlier this year tho, first time in europe
are there a lot of blacks in stockholm?
nice, germany is always nice, berlin and munich are both great
i didnt go to berlin or munich lmao
well as long as its not frankfurt
basically a corporate office as a city
well frankfurt was where i flew in, but i just caught a train straight to stuttgart
yeah I mean that is where you would prolly go if you go interncontinental
stuttgart I have never been but heard its good! I mean how can you go wrong with some bratwurst and bier
yeah, lived in Madrid before, gotta say german still beat them there
5/9/10 feels like the correct play here
did you go to nats this year?
had to give catan tourneys a miss this year
went for the swedish one last fall
does not seem to be organized this year afaik
soo that is why you went to stuttgart?
haha nice, do they pay for everything?
which was good, coz my flights were like 3.5k lol
haha yeah that is what I am saying
but yeah, free flights, hotel, beers, food
i came 5th tho, lost in the semis :'(
won all 4 prelims tho, so i walked away from the tourney with the best winrate xD
well still strong, did not this youtuber guy win
nah i beat youtuber guy haha
haha yeah that is always a bummer in torunament plau
but after having played a bit on colonist
dang it, no road builder or yop
catan irl is just so much more different imo
i just play online to blow off steam
who said they had to be mutually exclusive? hahaha
yeah ik guys, dont need to tell me 0 haha
need to compensate for last game
you came second last game haha
the devs did not give me any luck
and the lack of 9s got me
still had a better chance of winning than i did
yeah i did not play perfect
but hey, tinder and catan guys
basically the ppl who are the most interested in tinder
are all my friends in relationships, swear to god
they always wanna swipe on mine
nah i was stoked when i got out of the dating market, never care to touch those apps ever again
dont wait until red gets a city
cause i have a lead but have the weakest position
pretty sure if you dont got sheep no one got sheeep blue
it is kinda you vs red, black. you both well positioned to fight either road or army
im probs build to ten the way this is shaping up
i dont think he was robbing for sheep there
you and blue are competing for army
and you have a wood port, whats your point?
surprisingly, im not rolling in wheat :/
dont be gaslighting me like this
yeah black you are looking mighty fine
i have half a mind to kingmake blue just on principle with that table talk black
nah not need to king make her
but if you take road i will be very happy lol
bue black still takes it with 1 roads :/
he knows i dont keep road lol
road settle or road city is win for him
and you were gonna kingmake him?
have not really been king making here
you were, coz you just take road for win lmao
you got winning rolls blue? or you already have win in hand?
